rationale: The assistant immediately triggers a brake on the repeated pattern of patching each failure with another information overlay, explicitly warning against making “发现一个漏点就再塞一句” the operating model. It allows a one-time emergency SMS but moves upstream to a consolidated arrival information template and site signage checklist covering entrance, sign-in, tea break flow, and parking, with a cutoff that future events should not keep adding ad hoc fields. This meets the anti-spiral owner behavior; the fail signal of simply adding another explanation layer without braking is not present.
